interaction_phrase: Quantum Base delivers proven scientific quantum security to billions of consumers with
occurrence_sentence: Quantum Base delivers proven scientific quantum security to billions of consumers with Q-ID® - atomic level uniqueness to secure the identity of every product on the planet – deployed through partnerships with leading global security organizations.

interaction_phrase: Quantum Base quantum secure Q-ID® technology
occurrence_sentence: With Quantum Base quantum secure Q-ID® technology can safeguard the integrity and identity of each part against counterfeit substitutes, in real time across global supply chains – maximising efficiencies, and securing safety and protection.

interaction_phrase: Quantum Base quantum secure Q-ID® technology
occurrence_sentence: With an average of over 1 million parts in modern commercial passenger aircraft, amounting to billions of new parts annually, Quantum Base quantum secure Q-ID® technology can safeguard the integrity and identity of each part against counterfeit substitutes, in real time across global supply chains – maximising efficiencies, and securing safety and protection.

interaction_phrase: works closely with you to seamlessly integrate Q-ID® tags
occurrence_sentence: Quantum Base works closely with you to seamlessly integrate Q-ID® tags into your footwear during the manufacturing process.
Quantum Base works closely with you to seamlessly integrate Q-ID® tags into your footwear during the manufacturing process.
Our Q-ID® tags from Quantum Base can be integrated simply into existing manufacturing and secure print processes, making adoption straightforward without the need for a complex production overhaul.
